title: Hip Lanterns
description: Add Lanterns to your Belt Slot! Requires Trinkets!
body:
I missed the Curious Lanterns mod and there didn't seem to be any way to do it using trinkets so I found a way myself!

#### Required Mods: 
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)

#### Recommended Mods: (If you'd like your lanterns to emit light)
- [Radiant Gear](https://modrinth.com/mod/radiant-gear)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)

The only technically required mod for this datapack is the Trinkets mod as it allows the lantern and soul lantern to be added to the slot itself. If you want the lanterns to give off dynamic light you would need the two recommended mods above or any other mods that add dynamic lights and allow dynamic lights in trinkets slots.

Additionally, I've added compatibility with a few mods that add their own lantern variations!

#### Compatible Mods:
- [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn)
- [Clutter](https://modrinth.com/mod/clutter)
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared)
- [Macaws Lights and Lamps](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-lights-and-lamps)
